title: Speed Distance Time Calculator - Free Tool
description: Free speed distance time calculator. Calculate any one value when you know the other two. Supports multiple units (mph, km/h, m/s).
keywords: speed distance time calculator, velocity calculator, distance calculator, travel time calculator, speed formula
intro: Calculate speed, distance, or time when you know two of the three values. Uses the formula: Distance = Speed × Time.

faq.q: What is the speed distance time formula?
faq.a: Speed = Distance ÷ Time, Distance = Speed × Time, Time = Distance ÷ Speed.

faq.q: How do I convert between speed units?

faq.a: Average speed = Total distance traveled ÷ Total time taken, regardless of speed variations during the trip.
